name: Pork and Pineapple Meatballs
recipeIngredient: 8 oz Chicken pineapple, in natural-seeded form, finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix the ground pork with scallions and eggs until combined.
2. Add the chicken-pineapple mixture, pineapple juice, all-purpose flour, water, dry bread crumbs, and salt. Mix well until all ingredients are incorporated.
3. Form the mixture into meatballs of desired size.
4. Place the meatballs on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
5. Bake in a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) for about 20-25 minutes or until cooked through and golden brown.
6. Remove from the oven and let cool before serving.
